hero.name: Edwin N. Quesnay
hero.tagline: Structural Biologist (cryo-EM) using AI tools for scientific research
hero.description: Building a portfolio at the intersection of structural biology and artificial intelligence. Exploring how AI can accelerate scientific discovery in cryo-EM and beyond.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a structural biologist with a Ph.D. in Biosciences, specializing in cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) and membrane protein structure determination.
about.p2: My research focuses on understanding protein architecture at the molecular level. Currently, I am exploring how artificial intelligence tools can enhance and accelerate scientific research, from data collection automation to structure analysis.
about.p3: I am building this portfolio to document my journey into AI-assisted structural biology, sharing tools, tutorials, and insights along the way.
